{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202480130923902421A1C75AB10"}"},"total":542},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7615228292446634814","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"两三天追了三百多章，很久没有这么上头过了😋强推家人们🤓👆🏻嗯对我很少写书评的可能很人机还套模板但是真的很好看啊谁懂"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773061638,"group_id":"7556606148644719640","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3072497371585571"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"425"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":59691,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":92951,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7615229351437501246","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本完全是我近年来看过最对胃口的同人，没有之一！女主是那种拥有多个马甲的大佬，每个马甲性格迥异，但魅力都直接拉满。而且作者完全没有走那种“掉马甲+修罗场”的俗套路线，人物之间的情感更多是cb向，那种并肩作战、彼此信任的羁绊写得特别细腻。（当然如果你想磕cp也完全有空间，反正我先磕为敬），但感情线一直为剧情服务，点到即止，绝不喧宾夺主，女主从头到尾专注搞事业。
最让我惊喜的是，我对战国时代的背景基本算是一无所知（毕竟动漫只看鸣人时期），之前看其他同人写到这段总是无聊到想弃文。但这本完全不会！我反正是看得津津有味，作者文笔扎实，人物相处自然融洽，完全没有ooc的感觉。","text_exts":[{"e":76,"s":73,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741188811C75AB10%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227615229351437501246%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227556606148644719640%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773061173,"group_id":"7556606148644719640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"杂食党持续找书中","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzIfbGvKMflqeza7vSQ397auiXy0oWvI+/6mTkP+kJdk","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9a9b13bbd0e14ff2bcdf44be1ff7fe02~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704018&x-signature=752dIBg7dQhevLvN9pPX3PPZBRI%3D","user_id":"3072497371585571","user_name":"Lerov"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3072497371585571","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":103,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_info":{"abstract":"马甲文+女主无敌+主搞事情发刀子+乐子人+万人迷
穿越火影世界的睦月，绑定了情绪值收集系统，然而所收集的人必须是原著里留过姓名的人才行，穿到战国时代的睦月含泪贷款一百连抽，带着满身的挂，走进千手一族，帮战国F4出谋划策苟命，期待活到四战，开启无限月读。
战国时期，为救宇智波泉奈而死的她：核平的任务就交给你们了，请给世界带来核平。
一战时期，化身灭世者的她：区区宇智波斑和千手柱间，也敢跟我苍烬大人争辉。
二战时期，明明想开启四战，却一不小心当了火影的她：这次我来断后，木叶就交给你们了。
三战时期的她：卡卡西，请你杀了我。
后来，四战了，所有人都震惊的望着召唤出十尾的睦月，她不是最期待和平的吗？
睦月微笑：对啊，我的愿望就是世界核平。
只有黑绝最崩溃，我那么大一个妈妈呢，妈妈去哪里了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/593c117913a1d98b83b1c921a1e3ac67","author":"我在番茄朝九晚五","author_id":"","book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_name":"火影马甲文：代替斑做大boss","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556606255687533080","read_count":"31929","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1164506"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"483","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,无敌,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c0d178645c8368a8446a82e2be52a0dc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779302881&x-signature=YEPlVzsS4xXhzfOvIE9aZg3u274%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"791281729015821","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"425"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202480130923902421A1C75AB10"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读26小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":59691,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":92867,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":1311},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773149448,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7608732595682738968","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"巨好看
看追评就够了
马甲文不多真不多
之前评价瞎复制的
只能说没有情商说不出怎么好看[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771551503,"group_id":"7556606148644719640","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1355074643442141"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"522"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读17小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":62769,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7605381971184337688","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱看，爱国文太好看了。这本书真的很好看，尤其是在描写吕布为了貂蝉跟孙悟空。大战几百回合，但是薛宝钗确实太强了，要不是有诺手一个外圈挂+诺克萨斯断头台，这波m4六倍扫射必死，除此之外，我比较砍赏诸葛亮对花果山108个猴子说的一句话“小伙一身傲骨别在你亮哥面前摆谱”表现出诸葛亮对猴子三棒敲死他的愤慨，总而言之，这本书情节有趣，体系鲜明，伏笔众多，打斗场面如身临其境，人物性格描述很位!




人话就是好看但是不知道怎么说我没情商[哭]","text_exts":[{"e":38,"s":35,"text":"孙悟空","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741188811C75AB10%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227605381971184337688%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227556606148644719640%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%AD%99%E6%82%9F%E7%A9%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770771373,"group_id":"7556606148644719640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"日更0.1字","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7LUBksuzeTJBOuMk6QM5EQ0AjRwSYssmiSgMRq1afYT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/75f1806444404579a3707f3e93294dd6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701281&x-signature=QBf2G%2FgHLKvUtRIbfGzQtoE%2FsbQ%3D","user_id":"1355074643442141","user_name":"ZWWA"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1355074643442141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_info":{"abstract":"马甲文+女主无敌+主搞事情发刀子+乐子人+万人迷

t":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":60300,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":4423},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7611065948369388313","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写🉐太tm好看了吧😭👌🏻每个马甲都看🉐我好爽👌🏻就喜欢看满级大佬扮猪吃老虎，而且主角还不完全是没有感情的，会对原著人物产生感情，会尽力改变原来世界线，还答应复活他们。她真的，我哭死。作者更新的也太勤快了吧wc……太强了😭我真的太喜欢这本书了，写的完全不ooc，有笑点，有乐子，有刀子。真的非常非常好看👌🏻超级好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772092725,"group_id":"7556606148644719640","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2962523463624404"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"27"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读68小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":148630,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":243756,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7606381561505874750","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级超级超级好看啊👌🏻女主的每个马甲都超级超级香，一定要看啊啊啊！作者大大更新超级快😭质量超级高👌🏻看得我好爽👌🏻写的太好了吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771002067,"group_id":"7556606148644719640","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"超级鸽子王，小白写作","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NySUqc2wpwp/heO5XnwgRXIIlesR7bB4Ah0eQdMpVDu/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2df803a9cae04bc588defeb5257f896a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703961&x-signature=rSoy1JiWNDnSvQVj69c4J61qWKo%3D","user_id":"2962523463624404","user_name":"x程"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2962523463624404","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":5,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556606148644719640","book_info":{"abstract":"马甲文+女主无敌+主搞事情发刀子+乐子人+万人迷
穿越火影世界的睦月，绑定了情绪值收集系统，然而所收集的人必须是原著里留过姓名的人才行，穿到战国时代的睦月含泪贷款一百连抽，带着满身的挂，走进千手一族，帮战国F4出谋划策苟命，期待活到四战，开启无限月读。
战国时期，为救宇智波泉奈而死的她：核平的任务就交给你们了，请给世界带来核平。
一战时期，化身灭世者的她：区区宇智波斑和千手柱间，也敢跟我苍烬大人争辉。
二战时期，明明想开启四战，却一不小心当了火影的她：这次我来断后，木叶就交给你们了。
三战时期的她：卡卡西，请你杀了我。
后来，四战了，所有人都震惊的望着召唤出十尾的睦月，她不是最期待和平的吗？
睦月微笑：对啊，我的愿望就是世界核平。
